overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence showing a character exploring a dark, atmospheric Japanese-inspired temple environment at night. The character moves from an indoor candlelit room across a foggy wooden bridge illuminated by blue lanterns, then explores an open courtyard with traditional architecture before approaching the main temple entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit ritual chamber with candle altar

events.description: character reaches and begins opening the large wooden exit doors
transition from warm candlelight to cool blue exterior light as doors open

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the large wooden doors at the end of the chamber, holding a weapon

entered.detail: low wooden table with multiple burning candles providing warm orange light
high windows with blue moonlight filtering through wooden slats
large dark wooden doors with metal studs and brass ring handles

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a dimly lit ritual chamber illuminated by candlelight. A low altar table with burning candles sits to the right while blue light filters through barred windows above. The character walks forward and begins opening the large wooden exit doors, transitioning from warm interior light to the cool blue glow outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: mist-covered wooden bridge with blue spirit lanterns

events.description: exits indoor chamber onto long wooden bridge enveloped in thick fog
character slows while approaching the large wooden doors at the far end of the bridge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the foggy wooden bridge toward the distant temple doors, weapon ready

entered.detail: wooden railings lining both sides of the bridge fading into fog
glowing blue lanterns mounted on bridge railings creating an ethereal atmosphere
large wooden doors at the end of the bridge with blue light visible above

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a long wooden bridge shrouded in thick fog and illuminated by blue spirit lanterns along the railings. The bridge stretches forward into the mist toward distant temple doors. The character walks steadily across the wooden planks, the fog obscuring the sky and surroundings, creating an enclosed, mysterious atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional temple courtyard with stone pavement and hanging blue lanterns

events.description: opens wooden doors and enters open temple courtyard from enclosed bridge
character turns left to observe a candlelit shrine structure with sacred ropes
character begins ascending stone stairs toward the main temple entrance

agents.ego_description: exploring the temple courtyard, pausing to look at a candlelit side shrine before approaching the main temple stairs

entered.detail: open stone-paved courtyard surrounded by traditional curved-roof temple buildings
blue glowing lanterns hanging from wooden posts along the courtyard path
small traditional shrine gate with burning candles and shimenawa sacred ropes
wide stone staircase leading up to large dark wooden temple doors

segments.scene_description: Opening the doors at the bridge's end, the character enters a wide open temple courtyard paved with stone tiles. Blue lanterns hang from posts along the path, and stars are visible in the night sky above. The character turns to observe a candlelit shrine to the left, then continues toward a grand stone staircase leading to the main temple entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, candlelit ritual chamber into a vast, starlit temple courtyard. It begins inside a dimly lit room where warm candlelight clashes with blue light filtering through barred windows, moving forward as the character opens large wooden doors to exit. As the character emerges, the scene shifts to a long wooden bridge shrouded in thick fog and lined with glowing blue spirit lanterns that obscure the surrounding environment. The camera then follows the character through a second set of doors, where the oppressive mist suddenly clears to reveal a wide stone courtyard under a starry night sky. Finally, the view expands to encompass a candlelit shrine and a grand stone staircase leading toward the main temple entrance.
